summary: Adopted write-now/index-later strategy for hot and cold paths in appends and distills/embeds. Batching required due to model coexistence on CHost.
Qwen2.5-coder:7b runs on CHost with Intel Iris Xe graphics, using a 25%/75% CPU/GPU split.

Resolved D11 (Tier 3a backup): Seagate mounted at D:, cold-path mirrors .augment/memory/** to D:\Backups\MCProcessor\ via robocopy /MIR, logs info skip if D: absent, next run catches up automatically.
Tier 3a skip-branch self-test entry; safe to ignore.
Validating cold-path Phase 3b by committing and pushing nightly memory artifacts to origin/main.
Fixed cold-path Phase 3b by targeting repo root for Push-Location, added LASTEXITCODE check on git push.
Wrapped git block with EAP=Continue, replaced try/catch control flow with LASTEXITCODE checks, and restructured to avoid early-return.
